hero.title: Household Expense Splitter
hero.description: Record shared household expenses, split costs between members, track settlements, and review simple balances.
points: Settlement and balance summaries without banking or payment processing

flow.title: Members → Expenses → Settlements → Insights
steps: Create household members for a family, couple, roommate group, or shared living setup
Record shared expenses and split them equally or by manual amounts
Track settlements and review simple household balances

differences.title: A lightweight household splitter, not a finance platform
differences.description: Household Expense Splitter keeps shared living costs understandable without becoming accounting, banking, invoicing, budgeting, payments, tax, subscriptions, OCR, receipt scanning, or AI.

items.title: Members
items.description: Maintain the people who share household expenses.

items.title: Expenses
items.description: Record what was paid, who paid, who participated, and how the cost should be split.

items.title: Settlements
items.description: Log repayments between members so outstanding balances stay clear.

feel.title: A simple ledger for shared living
feel.description: The workflow is built for quick household entry and review, not formal finance operations.

items.title: Clear participants
items.description: Expenses show who paid and who shares the cost.

items.title: Simple balances
items.description: Insights summarize who has paid more or less after settlements.

items.title: Bounded by design
items.description: No bank sync, payments, OCR, receipts, invoices, tax, payroll, or AI workflows are included.

audiences.title: Who uses Household Expense Splitter
audiences.description: The app is useful for shared households that need a private running record of everyday shared costs.

items.title: Roommates
items.description: Split rent-adjacent household purchases, groceries, utilities, and supplies.

items.title: Couples and families
items.description: Track who paid and what each person owes without formal budgeting software.

items.title: Shared living groups
items.description: Record settlements when members pay each other back outside Ansiversa.

resourceSection.title: Household Expense Splitter essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused workspace for shared household expenses and settlements.

items.title: Members
items.description: Create, edit, and manage active household members.

items.title: Expenses
items.description: Create equal or manual splits with category, payer, date, notes, and archive status.

items.title: Settlements
items.description: Record repayments between members and keep outstanding balances current.

groupedSection.title: A direct shared-expense flow
groupedSection.description: The app moves from people to costs to repayment and review.

items.name: Members
items.description: Add the people involved in the household split.

items.name: Expenses
items.description: Record cost, payer, date, participants, and split method.

items.name: Settlements
items.description: Log repayments made outside the app.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review totals, category spend, member spend, recent records, and outstanding balances.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Household Expense Splitter follows the shared mini-app routing, protected workflow, overview metadata, and owner-scoped API patterns.
items: Owner-scoped API records and isolated database tables.
Responsive workflow inside the shared Ansiversa shell.

finalCta.title: Open Household Expense Splitter
finalCta.description: Explore the private shared household expense workflow.
